title: Looking for Category Manager at Dunzo

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Dunzo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Category Manager in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
